agent_effective_config.description: Low-cost, low-latency OpenAI agent and optional Judge profile.

agent_task.prompt:
Count the total number of characters in the following text:

AI is useful.

Count every letter, space, and punctuation mark as one character.
agent_task.required_output_format: Return only the final integer. Do not include explanations, labels, or punctuation.

agent_effective_config.description: Low-cost, low-latency OpenAI agent and optional Judge profile.

agent_task.prompt:
Calculate the following expression using the standard order of operations:

7 + 5 × 2
agent_task.required_output_format: Return only the final integer. Do not show work or include any additional text.

agent_effective_config.description: Low-cost, low-latency OpenAI agent and optional Judge profile.

agent_task.prompt: Explain what a variable is in computer programming to a complete beginner. Then give one very simple example using the variable name age.
agent_task.required_output_format: Use exactly two short sentences. The first sentence must define a variable. The second sentence must give an example using age.
